name: IpGetAdapter
title: IpGetAdapter
syntax: dword IpGetAdapter( long channel, word vlanId); // from 2
description: The function returns the index of the adapter which is attached to the given channel. For a VLAN adapter the channel and the vlanId has to be given.

parameters.name: vlanId
parameters.description: The VLAN id of the adapter.

return: The adapter index or 0 if there is no adapter for the given channel or VLAN available.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
